// ==== sales/infrastructure/customer_repository_impl.py ====
# <auto-generated/>
from __future__ import annotations
from koine_infrastructure import AggregateStore, InMemoryStore
from sales.customer import Customer
from sales.repositories.customer_repository import CustomerRepository
from sales.value_objects.customer_id import CustomerId


class CustomerRepositoryImpl(CustomerRepository):
    """In-memory-backed repository for the Customer aggregate root. Inject a persistent AggregateStore to back it with a real datastore; the default in-memory store is runnable in tests."""

    def __init__(self, store: AggregateStore[CustomerId, Customer] | None = None) -> None:
        self._store: AggregateStore[CustomerId, Customer] = (
            store if store is not None else InMemoryStore[CustomerId, Customer](lambda entity: entity.id)
        )

    async def get(self, id: CustomerId) -> Customer | None:
        return await self._store.get(id)

    async def save(self, aggregate: Customer) -> None:
        await self._store.add(aggregate)

    async def update(self, aggregate: Customer) -> None:
        await self._store.update(aggregate)

    async def remove(self, aggregate: Customer) -> None:
        await self._store.remove(aggregate)

// ==== sales/infrastructure/order_repository_impl.py ====
# <auto-generated/>
from __future__ import annotations
from koine_infrastructure import AggregateStore, InMemoryStore
from sales.order import Order
from sales.repositories.order_repository import OrderRepository
from sales.value_objects.customer_id import CustomerId
from sales.value_objects.order_id import OrderId


class OrderRepositoryImpl(OrderRepository):
    """In-memory-backed repository for the Order aggregate root. Inject a persistent AggregateStore to back it with a real datastore; the default in-memory store is runnable in tests."""

    def __init__(self, store: AggregateStore[OrderId, Order] | None = None) -> None:
        self._store: AggregateStore[OrderId, Order] = (
            store if store is not None else InMemoryStore[OrderId, Order](lambda entity: entity.id)
        )

    async def get(self, id: OrderId) -> Order | None:
        return await self._store.get(id)

    async def save(self, aggregate: Order) -> None:
        await self._store.add(aggregate)

    async def update(self, aggregate: Order) -> None:
        await self._store.update(aggregate)

    async def remove(self, aggregate: Order) -> None:
        await self._store.remove(aggregate)

    async def by_customer(self, customer: CustomerId) -> tuple[Order, ...]:
        items = await self._store.all()
        return tuple(entity for entity in items if entity.customer == customer)

// ==== sales/infrastructure/unit_of_work.py ====
# <auto-generated/>
from __future__ import annotations
from sales.infrastructure.customer_repository_impl import CustomerRepositoryImpl
from sales.infrastructure.order_repository_impl import OrderRepositoryImpl
from sales.repositories.customer_repository import CustomerRepository
from sales.repositories.order_repository import OrderRepository


class UnitOfWork:
    """In-memory unit of work over the Sales context's aggregate repositories."""

    orders: OrderRepository
    customers: CustomerRepository

    def __init__(
        self,
        orders: OrderRepository | None = None,
        customers: CustomerRepository | None = None,
    ) -> None:
        self.orders = orders if orders is not None else OrderRepositoryImpl()
        self.customers = customers if customers is not None else CustomerRepositoryImpl()

    async def save_changes(self) -> None:
        return None
